description:
Warzone 2100, released in 1999 and developed by Pumpkin Studios, was a ground-breaking and innovative 3D real-time
strategy game.

3D Open Source Real-Time Strategy Game Command the forces of The Project in a battle to rebuild the world after
mankind has been nearly destroyed by nuclear missiles. Offers an extensive single-player campaign, cross-platform
multiplayer, local skirmish with AI bots.
`warzone2100_win_installer.exe` -- For Windows (7-11+)
`warzone2100_macOS_universal.zip` -- For macOS (10.14+)
`warzone2100_ubuntu22.04_amd64.deb` -- For Ubuntu 22.04
`warzone2100_ubuntu24.04_amd64.deb` -- For Ubuntu 24.04+
`warzone2100_src.tar.xz` -- The tarball for Linux / BSD / other systems. (full source / data)

IMPORTANT: To build from source, use the warzone2100_src.tar.xz tarball.

> The auto-generated GitHub "Source code (zip) / (tar.gz)" links do not include the Git-based
> autorevision information.

To install the .deb files, use `sudo apt install`. Example:

`sudo apt install ./warzone2100_ubuntu24.04_amd64.deb`
